title: MARKSMAN 3 METERS TAPE MEASURE 16 MM
description: These measuring tapes have a textured rubber non-slip grip case for improved comfort and impact resistance. With precision marked steel blades and hooks with a corrosion resistant coating, make these tape measures ideal for on site and industrial use.
